item.title: SamLee: Sam Lee @SamLee · 2min Guardiola talked about this a few weeks ago and he said City have other players to get the ball i
item.description: Sam Lee @SamLee · 2min Guardiola talked about this a few weeks ago and he said City have other players to get the ball in those areas (Stones, Guehi, Rodri, Bernardo I think he mentioned). I do agree that there’s value in it and it may happen eventually. We talked about this on @LMTPod yesterday Mostrar más Cita F2P @Flair2Play · 2h Pep wants Cherki to stick to the final 3rd, to be as close to Haaland as possible, rightfully so I should say. However, there is value in letting him pick it up from a deeper position; let him have a go at the opposition’s back line (02:17) or simply thread it from deep (03:29). x.com/flair2play/sta… 1 3 514

item.title: SamLee: Sam Lee @SamLee · 2min En respuesta a @SamLee This is similar to Reijnders. City don’t ‘need’ him to be deep right now,
item.description: Sam Lee @SamLee · 2min En respuesta a @SamLee This is similar to Reijnders. City don’t ‘need’ him to be deep right now, because they have other players for that and they see Reijnders as somebody who can be useful higher up, but personally I think they would get more out of him if he got on the ball deep 2 249

Abdul Rehman @FPL_Salah · 2min In my latest @TheAthleticFC article myself and @HollyShand discuss our chip strategies, DGW differentials, players to avoid and and more

item.title:
ChelseaFC: Chelsea FC @ChelseaFC · 3min For those made to be seen. ​
Taking inspiration from three iconic 90s goalkeeper shirts,
item.description:
Chelsea FC @ChelseaFC · 3min For those made to be seen. ​
Taking inspiration from three iconic 90s goalkeeper shirts, the collection blends the vibrancy of the era with a fearless style of football. ​
The Retro Collection is available now in-store and online. De chelseafc.com 32 18 146 2 mil
